creator: z_axis@163.com
text:
Under emacs eshell, `sudo zfs allow`=>password：abc123, then the password is visible !  However, on openbsd it is normal to get password from minibuffer and display "***" instead.

$echo $TERM => dumb
$uname -a => FreeBSD mybsd 11.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 11.1-RELEASE #0 r321309: Fri Jul 21 02:08:28 UTC 2017
